What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case?

<!-- How would you like AgentPrimer to behave? -->

## Alternatives you've considered

<!-- Other approaches you've thought about, and why this one is better. -->

## Scope

<!--
Is this:
  - A new built-in tool?              → see lib/builtin-tools-registry.ts
  - A new function tool to ship?      → see defaults/function-tools/
  - A new SKILL.md skill to ship?     → see defaults/skills/
  - A UI change?                       → see components/ and app/(main)/
  - A change to the agent loop itself? → see lib/agent.ts
  - Something else?
-->

## Are you willing to send a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I can work on this
- [ ] I'd like guidance first
- [ ] No, just suggesting
